dish_name: Peasant Bread with a Stand Mixer
description: Peasant bread is a rustic artisan bread with a soft grain, crispy crust, and nutty flavor. It is an excellent beginner bread recipe because it is easy and quick to make with simple ingredients. While a stand mixer is not required, it will give you a head start on gluten formation without hand kneading. You can also make it entirely no-knead bread.
ingredients: [{"name": "AP flour", "unit": "cup", "amount": "4 ½"}, {"name": "whole wheat flour", "unit": "cup", "amount": "¼"}, {"name": "yeast (rapid rise)", "unit": "package", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "salt", "unit": "teaspoon", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "sugar", "unit": "teaspoon", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "water", "unit": "cup", "amount": "1 ¾"}]
instructions: 1. In 1 ¾ cups of warm (110°) water, dissolve 1 teaspoon of sugar and 1 package of rapid-rise yeast. Wait for some bubbles to prove the yeast is good. 2. Add the yeast mixture to a preheated stand mixer bowl. With a dough hook and the mixer on "2", slowly add 4 ½ cups AP flour, ¼ cup whole wheat flour, and 1 teaspoon salt. Allow the dough to mix for 10 minutes. 3. Move the dough to a lightly oiled bowl, form into a ball, cover with plastic wrap, and place in a warm spot for about 60 minutes until about tripled in size. 4. "Preheat" a Dutch oven with hot water, then dry and lightly coat with oil and move the dough into it. Cover and place in a warm spot and allow to double in size — about 30-45 minutes. 5. Preheat oven to 450° conventional. Brush the top with some water. 6. Bake for about 25-30 minutes until internal temp of about 200°, a nice crust, and a hollow sound.
notes: This is an "ugly" bread, but it makes up for that in taste and texture. Use a pan with high enough sides to contain the soft dough. Cooking time varies depending on pan size and thickness; check internal temperature to determine doneness. Baking uncovered helps crustiness. Bread is good for 3 days but molds fast due to no preservatives. Can be frozen to extend shelf life.
tags: French Peasant Bread, No Knead Peasant Bread, Peasant Bread, Stand Mixer Bread, Artisan Bread, Bread
